description: Composition Beige trousers made of 97% cotton and 3% lycra, has a zipper and button closure on the waistband, belt loops on the waistband, two buttoned patch pockets at the back, two pockets on the front and one small coin pocket above the right patch pocket Fit Skin fit; Low rise Wash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Stylish casual trousers for women with a slim fit and low rise, from scullers. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” waist 26” and hips 36”
